Exps.Exp: Q.KieuGiayChungNhanBaoHiem === null ? null : (Q.KieuGiayChungNhanBaoHiem != 'Điện tử' ? (F.isEmpty(Q.NgayCapGCN)? Q.NgayBatDau : Q.NgayCapGCN) : (R.path === 'quote/policy-endorsement' ? OQ.NgayCapGCN: null))

(R.path === 'quote/policy-endorsement' || R.path === 'quote/detail') && G.endorsementType == 5 && G.haveActiveClaim == true && (G.endorsementSubKind == 0 || G.endorsementSubKind == 1 || G.endorsementSubKind == 2) ? OQ.NgayKetThucGoc : Q.NgayKetThuc
